fields.title: Stabilize memory runtime full-suite prompt reload test
fields.description: `cd extensions/tau && npm run gate` intermittently fails in the full Vitest suite at `test/memory-tool-runtime.test.ts` / `keeps newly saved memory out of the active-session system prompt until session_start`: expected the reloaded before_agent_start result to differ from `{ systemPrompt: 'base' }`, but received `{ systemPrompt: 'base' }`. The same test passes when run targeted with `npx vitest run test/memory-tool-runtime.test.ts -t "keeps newly saved memory out of the active-session system prompt until session_start" --reporter=verbose`. The failure appeared while changing only Ralph prompt copy in `src/services/ralph.ts`, so it appears unrelated/flaky full-suite state interaction.
fields.acceptance_criteria: The memory runtime prompt reload test passes reliably in the full `cd extensions/tau && npm run gate` suite and targeted runs, with no dependence on suite order or shared state.
